nodes.label: CNIL – Commission Nationale Informatique et Libertés
nodes.norm_label: cnil – commission nationale informatique et libertes

nodes.label: Parcours de prise en charge du patient en HAD
nodes.description: Infographic illustrating the 6-step patient care pathway in HAD (Hospitalisation A Domicile - Home Hospitalization). Shows a sequential process from prescription to end of care, with icons and descriptions for each step.

properties.title: Parcours de prise en charge du patient en HAD
properties.visual_style: flat design infographic with numbered steps and arrows
properties.tagline: L'HAD assure des soins de qualité, au plus près du patient, tout au long de son parcours.

nodes.norm_label: parcours de prise en charge du patient en had

nodes.label: Étape 1 - Prescription
nodes.description: First step of the HAD patient care pathway. The prescription is made by the doctor in charge of the patient.

properties.action: Prescription réalisée par le médecin en charge du patient

nodes.label: Étape 2 - Évaluation
nodes.description: Second step of the HAD patient care pathway. Evaluation of the care request by a nursing advisor (infirmière de Conseil et de Liaison).

properties.actor: Infirmier(ère) de Conseil et de Liaison
properties.action: Évaluation de la demande de prise en charge

nodes.label: Étape 3 - Décision
nodes.description: Third step of the HAD patient care pathway. The coordinating doctor gives their agreement/approval for the care.

properties.action: Accord donné par le médecin coordonnateur

nodes.label: Étape 4 - Mise en place au domicile de l'HAD
nodes.description: Fourth step of the HAD patient care pathway. The HAD team sets up care at the patient's home.

properties.action: Mise en place au domicile de l'HAD par l'équipe de l'HADRUN

nodes.norm_label: etape 4 - mise en place au domicile de l'had

nodes.label: Étape 5 - Réalisation des soins
nodes.description: Fifth step of the HAD patient care pathway. Healthcare professionals carry out the care.

properties.action: Réalisation des soins par les professionnels de santé

nodes.label: Étape 6 - Fin de la prise en charge du patient
nodes.description: Sixth and final step of the HAD patient care pathway. End of care is validated by the medical staff.

properties.action: Fin de la prise en charge validée par le corps médical

nodes.norm_label: etape 6 - fin de la prise en charge du patient

nodes.label: HAD - Hospitalisation A Domicile
nodes.description: HAD (Hospitalisation A Domicile) is a French home hospitalization service that provides quality care close to the patient throughout their care pathway. The organization referenced is HADRUN.

properties.mission: Assurer des soins de qualité, au plus près du patient, tout au long de son parcours

links.rationale: The combined icon of a house with a stethoscope overlaid symbolizes home-based healthcare, consistent with the HADRUN brand
The SVG contains a pentagonal house/home shape drawn with a path element
The rounded-rectangle background uses fill #1D3461 (navy blue)
Both the house outline and stethoscope elements use stroke/fill #C94070 (rose/pink)
The SVG contains stethoscope elements: two earpiece circles, a curved tube path, and a chest piece circle
House shape combined with stethoscope suggests home healthcare or medical home services
Stethoscope is a universal medical/healthcare symbol
